email.subject: loved your post on agent eval suites
email.body: Hey - read your post on Sunday about why eval suites kill more agent demos than model picks. We're a series A team (28 people) shipping agents into legal workflow and hit exactly the wall you described. Could I grab 15 min next week to compare notes? Calendly link in sig.

email.subject: {{first_name}}, quick question
email.body: Hi {{first_name}}, I noticed your company is growing and wanted to see if we could help with your SEO and content. We work with companies like yours to drive 3-5x organic traffic in 90 days. Open to a chat?

email.subject: intro from northstar
email.body: Hi - partner at Northstar (early stage, dev tools focus). Saw the LIN-2 board memo making the rounds. Our thesis on agent infra overlaps. No rush, but if you're raising in the next 6mo would love 20 min.

email.subject: buyer for your domain
email.body: I have a client interested in purchasing your domain. Please advise on price.

email.subject: contract amendment
email.body: Hi - per our master agreement clause 4.2 we need to extend the SOW through Q3 and adjust the monthly retainer to £8,500. Can you countersign attached?

email.subject: high DA guest post on your blog
email.body: Hello, I noticed you have a great blog. I'd like to contribute a high-quality guest post on AI tools. We can also exchange backlinks. Let me know if interested!

email.subject: competitor or partner?
email.body: hey - we ship a similar pack store but for design systems. wondering if we should swap notes on stripe checkout conversion or whether we're stepping on each others toes. happy either way.

email.subject: staff eng opportunity
email.body: Saw your background and wanted to flag a Staff Engineer role on our agent platform team. Comp range 280-340 + equity. Open to a quick call?
